Document:
# JACKRABBIT-CLASS PRIVATE SECURITY SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Medium
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1-2
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Uranium
# Shuttle Brief
"Whether your goal is to overpower or merely intimidate, the PT Jackrabbit has you covered for all of your asset protection needs."
"Fast, lightweight, and outfitted with a personal armory, this ship gets the job done."
[italic]Prestige Travel: Making life for the rich even easier.[/italic]
# Ship Functions
[italic]Note: Airlock closing, bolting, and shuttering is controlled by a signal timer located inside the airlock. Connections to airlocks and shutters are made from here.[/italic]
# Piloting
[textlink="Piloting" link="Piloting"/]
[textlink="Sector Topology" link="SectorTopology"/]
# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Nanotrasen vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.

[textlink="Preflight Checklist" link="PreflightChecklist"/]
